lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Ahoy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Welcome to the Brimhaven Agility Arena!

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: If ye want to know more talk to Cap'n Izzy, he found it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do?

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: I be the Jack o' Tickets. I exchange the tickets ye collect in the Agility Arena for more stuff. Ye can obtain more agility experience or some items ye won't find anywhere else!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to trade in my tickets, please.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Aye, ye be on the right tack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've done all the easy tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arr, ye have that, I see yer list. I s'pose ye'll be wantin' yer reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, ye'll 'ave ta come back when ye has more space in yer pack.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: These 'ere Karamja gloves be a symbol of yer explorin' on the island. I'll 'ave a word with some of the seafarin' folk who sail to Port Sarim and Ardougne, so they'll take ye on board half price if ye be wearin' them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've done all the medium tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arr, so ye have. I s'pose ye'll be wantin' yer reward upgraded then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: The enchantment on these 'ere Karamja gloves be a symbol of yer further explorin' on the island. They'll take ye to an underground mine in Shilo, Cap'n Izzy's arranged it so ye gets a little extra benefit in our

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Agility Arena. Ye can have this lamp too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've done all the hard tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arr, so ye have. I s'pose ye'll be wantin' yer reward upgraded again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: The enchantment on these 'ere Karamja gloves be a symbol of yer exhaustive explorin'. They'll take ye to a mine under Shilo Village now infinitely, an' all the merchants will give ye discounts. Ye can have this lamp

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've done all the elite tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arr, that be an incredible achievement, so it be! I suppose ye'll be wanting yer reward upgraded again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: The enchantment on these 'ere Karamja gloves be the ultimate symbol of yer exhaustive explorin'. Ye'll now get double TokKul from the Fight Cave, Inferno an' TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Ye'll have a chance for double tickets in our Agility Arena 'ere. Ye can resurrect in the Fight Cave once per day, an' even enter some places fer free.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: I can make the metal dragons under Brimhaven give ye bars as banknotes too, if ye likes.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Ye can have that lamp too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, it be a diary that tracks yer achievements on Karamja. Once ye've explored enough, I give ye some enchanted gloves, an' the people of Karamja reward ye for yer hard work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the rewards?

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, that depends what tier ye wants to know about.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Ye gets a pair of special Karamja gloves. The seafarin' folk who sail to Port Sarim and Ardougne will take ye on board half price if ye be wearin' them.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, I upgrade the Karamja gloves so ye gets a little extra benefit in our Agility Arena with 'em on, and now they'll take ye to the special mine under Shilo Village, an ye still gets the easy rewards too.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, I upgrade the Karamja gloves so they can take ye to a special mine under Shilo Village infinitely. Ye still gets the easy and medium rewards too.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, ye can get double TokKul from the Fight Cave, Inferno an' TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges, an' have a chance for double tickets in our Agility Arena 'ere.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Ye can resurrect in the Fight Cave once per day, an' even enter some places fer free.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: I can make the metal dragons under Brimhaven give ye bars as banknotes too, if ye likes. Ye still gets the easy, medium an' hard rewards too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another set of Karamja gloves?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I change the metal dragons' bar drops?

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, those metal dragons under Brimhaven will drop their bars as banknotes for ye.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, those metal dragons under Brimhaven will drop their bars as normal items for ye.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, those metal dragons under Brimhaven will drop their bars as normal items for ye.

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Arrr, those metal dragons under Brimhaven will drop their bars as banknotes for ye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What potions do these new herbs make?

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: I be no herbalist but I were given the recipes to go with these herbs...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

sections.title: Using a discontinued Agility arena ticket on Pirate Jackie the Fruit

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Ahoy! Yer want to swap these old tickets for some vouchers?

sections.title: Using Agility Arena graceful outfit pieces on her

lines.speaker: Pirate Jackie the Fruit
lines.text: Do ye want the colour removing off that? Ye won't get yer tickets back, mind you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, remove the colours.
